creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, this is not the proper forum to request this. As far as I know 
there are more feature requests of this, so this can be ideal for the 
IdeaList on the wiki (wiki.freebsd.org). That said, the PR system is for 
reporting known defects, and not for future requests so I will close the 
ticket. Thanks for taking the time and using FreeBSD though!
